text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've just wrapped up training for the day with
Kitasan Black when she pauses and turns to me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Would it be all right if I continue training a little
by myself after this?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how to explain it, but... I don't feel
like I've done enough running today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's gaze is focused on Satono
Diamond, who is still running silently around the
track even now.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I can't afford to lose to Dia. I just can't!
choice_data_list: I understand! I'll stay behind with you!
I understand! I'll stay behind with you!

You'll need to pace yourself if you don't want
to lose.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I can't afford to lose to Dia. I just can't!
choice_data_list: I understand! I'll stay behind with you!
I understand! I'll stay behind with you!

You'll need to pace yourself if you don't want
to lose.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Just like how sharing the weight of a portable
shrine with everyone at a festival makes me feel
more powerful...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just know I'll be able to do great so long as I'm
with you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After wrapping up our conversation, Kitasan
Black and I do some extra intense training
together.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I know it's important to do things in
moderation, but still...
choice_data_list: Instead of running, could I ask you a favor?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
choice_data_list:
Can you tell me what you think of this new
training routine I'm drafting?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'd be glad to if it'll help improve my
running!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. This combination of exercises can definitely
help strengthen my weaknesses...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, could we increase the amount of weight
lifting I do in this section? Considering how I did
in my previous scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I have a meeting with Kitasan Black and
iron out a more efficient training routine for her.
